dimension_descriptions.target_detectability: A trained human labeler can identify the test target at native resolution without ambiguity.
dimension_descriptions.distractor_adequacy: Sufficient plausible confusers present so the task is non-trivial at low resolution.
dimension_descriptions.resolution_sensitivity: The task becomes measurably harder as input resolution drops — i.e. the image actually tests what this benchmark claims to test.
dimension_descriptions.ground_truth_clarity: Labels are unambiguous, verifiable, and reproducible by a second labeler.
dimension_descriptions.domain_neutrality: The image does not lean so hard into one aesthetic (fantasy art, corporate UI, medical imaging) that it only measures one domain.
dimension_descriptions.generation_fidelity: The generated image matches the prompt intent closely enough to serve as a test case — artifacts, deformations, or off-spec outputs disqualify it.
